Metadata.title: HTG — Spiritual Development Sessions
Metadata.description: Spiritual development sessions led by Natalia HTG. Recordings, workshops and individual sessions online.

Home.hero_subtitle: Sessions led by Natalia HTG — available online, at your own pace.
Home.vod_subtitle: Discover recordings from recent workshops and group sessions.
Home.subscriptions_subtitle: Flexible options for accessing our session archive.
Home.help_subtitle: We're here to help. Call or write to us.

Auth.login_subtitle: Enter your email address — we'll send you a login code.
Auth.code_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {email}.
Auth.error_email: Failed to send code. Please try again.
Auth.consent_label: I consent to the processing of my data regarding beliefs and health status for the purpose of providing spiritual development sessions (GDPR Art. 9).

Sessions.title: Group sessions
Sessions.subtitle: Recordings from workshops and group sessions available in monthly packages or individually.
Sessions.sessions_in_set: {count, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} in set
Sessions.empty_description: We're working on making our archive available. Check back soon!

Subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
Subscriptions.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your needs.
Subscriptions.a_la_carte_desc: Choose specific sessions from any month. Access for 24 months from purchase — you buy it, you own it.
Subscriptions.monthly_desc: Ready-made set of sessions from a given month at a lower price. Access for 24 months from purchase — you buy it, you own it.
Subscriptions.yearly_desc: Full access to the entire archive and new sessions for 12 months. Pay for 10 months, get 12.
Subscriptions.yearly_notice: The Yearly Package is a rental of the full session catalog for 12 months. After the year ends, access expires unless you renew.
Subscriptions.ownership_notice: You buy it, you keep it for 24 months
Subscriptions.rental_notice: You rent the catalog for 12 months

Recordings.title: Public recordings
Recordings.subtitle: Free materials on YouTube — get to know our work.

Account.title: My Account
Account.no_sessions: You don't have access to any sessions yet.
Account.no_subscriptions: You don't have any active subscriptions.
Account.full_catalog_access: Full access to the entire session archive

Player.concurrent_message: Your account is already playing content on another device. Stop playback there to start here.

Individual.title: Individual Sessions
Individual.subtitle: Private live session with Natalia HTG. Choose a session type, preferred date and pay online.
Individual.step_1: Choose session type — solo with Natalia or with an assistant (Agata / Justyna).
Individual.step_2: Select your preferred date — we'll contact you to confirm the exact time.
Individual.step_3: Pay online — you'll receive an invoice and confirmation via email.
Individual.step_4: On the session day, you'll receive a room link — join at the scheduled time.
Individual.date_hint: We'll contact you to confirm the exact date and time.
Individual.topics_placeholder: Describe what you'd like to work on during the session...
Individual.cancel_policy: Reschedule / free cancellation: up to 24h before the session. Cancellation < 24h: prepayment is forfeited.
